plans.name: Infrastructure Setup Fee
plans.description: Covers the full build-out of your digital marketing infrastructure: professional multi-page website, AI chatbot, AI voice agent, A2P 10DLC re-registration, Google Business Profile setup, reputation management system, lead nurture automation, and CRO baseline. Auto-expires after 3 payments.

plans.name: Monthly Marketing Service
plans.description: Your ongoing managed marketing service: SEO, content marketing, GBP posting, review generation, competitor monitoring, lead nurture optimization, CRO, monthly reporting, and strategy calls. Locked at the Growth tier rate for life.

terms.ownership_transfer: full on completion or performance-guarantee trigger
